data.body:
## Why is Harmonic Analysis and Study Important for Spanish Businesses?

A power system’s harmonics are essential because they influence the quality of the electricity and how things work. High harmonic levels can reduce the lifespan of equipment components and make them overheat. Harmonics alter the pure sine waves produced by an ideal power source. Harmonic distortion makes it difficult for businesses to produce goods and run operations. Here are a few situations when harmonic distortion affects commerce. 

- Harmonics cause components to lose more energy as a result (joule effect).
- The quantity of power subscribed to increases when harmonics are present. Spending grows as a result, showing that client services are becoming more expensive.
- Equipment that is too large because the power supply is insufficient
- The lifespan of different components is shortened, which lowers productivity, when the distortion level approaches 10%.
- Peak currents produced by harmonics trip outdated technology, causing output losses and a significant cost for the time required to get the system working again.

## Harmonics Result In:

Loads that don’t move in a straight line and draw current in quick bursts cause harmonics. As a result of these pulses, harmonic currents travel throughout the whole power system as distorted current waves. Electricity’s reliability and efficiency in commercial settings are hampered by harmonics. Most businesses have electrical systems that can safely handle nonlinear loads of up to 15%. Harmonic distortions may be harmful if nonlinear loads account for more than 15% of the total load. As a result, it is crucial to monitor harmonic levels to make sure they do not get excessively high. A harmonic inquiry and analysis may therefore aid in keeping track of potential threats and their sources. This can help to reduce the possibility of unfavorable consequences and aid in the eradication of harmonic-related issues during the design process.

## Methodology for Harmonic Analysis:

Even if harmonic issues are rare, it is still necessary to perform a timely harmonic analysis to make sure they are not serious. The following are the steps for determining the harmonic level: 

- As a first step, draw a one-line diagram of the electrical system and note any nonlinear loads.
- The common link (PCC) discovery is the main topic of the graphic.
- System bus plants that are deformed are the focus.
- Harmonics-related information is complete.
- Obtain the PCC values predetermined by the utility. The permissible current and voltage harmonics as well as the highest and lowest short-circuit fault levels are included.
- It uses free software to simulate harmonic analysis.
- Analyze the electricity in the system harmonically.
- Calculate the discrete distortions at the buses and PCC as well as the overall current and voltage.
- Make a harmonic frequency spectrum.
- Choose the appropriate harmonics control techniques. Harmonic distortion is over the limits.
- Once the mitigating measures have been put in place, do the harmonic analysis once more.

An accredited business that analyzes and researches harmonics is CareLabs. Professionals with extensive knowledge may do accurate and secure evaluations to pinpoint prospective harmonic levels and support in keeping harmonics at suitable levels to avert issues in the future.

## Advantages of CareLabs' Service:

- Safer electricity systems that adhere to regulations and criteria
- Working to your full potential helps you save time and money.
- Bolster workplace safety.
- In case of emergency, promptly offer substitutes.
- A larger safety margin is required.
- To save time, produce arc flash labels and work permits automatically.
- Stay away from possible fines and legal costs.

To ensure that our professionals are available nearby in the event of an emergency or for normal work, CareLabs employs staff members in many locations. CareLabs quickly attained ISO 9001:2008 certification and built a clientele with a solid reputation and positive reviews. In important locations including, CareLabs offers investigation and Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, and Seville. analysis services.
